rows.label: qev090101_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey. You. I've been lookin' for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0002
rows.name:
C'mere a minute. I got somethin'
you're about to do for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev090101_SEL0011
rows.name: Do as the man says.

rows.label: qev090101_JNK0020
rows.name: Beg Off

rows.label: qev090101_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you have to go wash your hair.

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0003
rows.name: Smart choice. Smart people live longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Wash your... Hey! Are you
tryin' to clown me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Now shut up and do as you're
told, and this'll go easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Here. I picked out a mission or
three for you. No thanks needed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Run along and handle 'em. Should
be a cake walk. Real easy street.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_JNK0030
rows.name: Rebuff

rows.label: qev090101_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him to get lost.

rows.label: qev090101_JNK0040
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev090101_SEL0041
rows.name: Say that you'll do them.

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're a tough potato, aren't
ya? I like tough potatoes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0009
rows.name: ...So don't make me mash you, potato.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'll throw the details to your comm device.
Get it done and get back to me. Kapeesh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'll send the details to your comm
device. Get back to me when you're done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Easy enough, yeah? Oh, and don't take too
long, or you and me'll have problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Time to prove you ain't all
show. And you better impress![ST:wait ]
